columns.name: TimeGenerated
columns.description: The time when the log entry was generated.

columns.name: event_date
columns.description: Date and time when the event occurred (event-occurrence time).

columns.name: EventType
columns.description: Type of event.

columns.name: Description
columns.description: Description of this event.

columns.name: Connection
columns.description: Name of the connection the event relates to.

columns.name: ConnectionId
columns.description: Identifier of the connection the event relates to.

columns.name: ClientId
columns.description: Identifier of the application (client) that triggered the event.

columns.name: ClientName
columns.description: Name of the application (client) that triggered the event.

columns.name: SrcIpAddr
columns.description: IP address of the log event source.

columns.name: HttpUserAgent
columns.description: User agent that triggered the event.

columns.name: SrcHostname
columns.description: Hostname the event applies to.

columns.name: ActorUserId
columns.description: Identifier of the user involved in the event.

columns.name: ActorUsername
columns.description: Name of the user involved in the event.

columns.name: Audience
columns.description: API audience the event applies to.

columns.name: Scope
columns.description: Scopes the event applies to.

columns.name: Strategy
columns.description: Name of the strategy involved in the event.

columns.name: StrategyType
columns.description: Type of strategy involved in the event.

columns.name: LocationInfo
columns.description: Geographical location information of the event source.

columns.name: Details
columns.description: Additional useful details related to the event, in JSON format.

columns.name: LogId
columns.description: Unique identifier of the log event.

columns.name: TenantName
columns.description: Name of the Auth0 tenant that produced the event.

columns.name: IsMobile
columns.description: Indicates whether the event originated from a mobile device.

columns.name: Auth0Domain
columns.description: Auth0 host/domain configured for this connection; hard-coded on every record so hosts can be differentiated.
